changeSet.author: Eugene A. Kalosha
changeSet.sql:
INSERT INTO public.organizations (id, name, description, tax_id, vat_id, org_type, street_address_1, street_address_2, country_id, state_id, city_id, zip, phone, site, currency_id, language_id, notes, status_id, average_revenue) VALUES (101, 'Toyota Motor North America, Inc.', 'Auto manufacturer', '06-123456', '3788883338', 'Organization', '123 Main St', 'Suite 1000', 229, 4006, 47561, '10153', NULL, 'http://www.toyota-global.com', 2, 18, '4th Largest Company Globally', 1, 600000000), (102, 'Evans Resource Group', 'VAD', '06-123432', NULL, 'Vendor', '747 3rd Ave.', '2nd Floor', 229, 4006, 47561, '10017', NULL, 'www.evansresource.com', 2, 18, NULL, 1, 4000000), (103, 'Cyber Int', 'Cyber intel vendor', '514477538', NULL, 'Vendor', '1 Rothchild Blvd', 'Suite 200', 108, 1574, 19486, '65217', NULL, 'www.cyberint.com', 51, 198, NULL, 1, 3000000), (104, 'Cybersel', 'Cyber Reseller', '514473332', NULL, 'Vendor', 'Via Poliziano, 54', NULL, 109, 1587, 20125, '10153', NULL, 'www.eurosel.co.il', 11, 222, NULL, 1, 1000000), (105, 'Jefferies', 'Investment bank', '06-187653', NULL, 'Subsidiary', '525 Madison Ave', NULL, 229, 4006, 47561, '10024', NULL, 'www.jefferies.com', 2, 18, NULL, 1, 4000000000), (106, 'AmTrust', 'Insurance Company', '06-196523', NULL, 'Organization', '59 Maiden Lane', NULL, 229, 4006, 47561, '10038', NULL, 'www.amtrust.com', 2, 18, NULL, 1, 4000000000), (107, 'Cleary, Gottlieb, Hamilton and Steen', 'Cyber Law Firm', '06-962224', NULL, 'Organization', '1 Liberty Way', '32nd Floor', 229, 4006, 47561, '10011', NULL, 'www.cleary.com', 2, 18, NULL, 2, 400000000), (108, 'Arthur J. Gallagher', '4th Largest Insurance Broker in US', '06-654333', NULL, 'Organization', '250 Park Ave.', NULL, 229, 4006, 47561, '10022', NULL, 'www.ajg.com', 2, 18, NULL, 1, 1000000000), (109, 'AIG', 'Largest global insurance carrier', '06-732533', NULL, 'Organization', '50 water St.', NULL, 229, 4006, 47561, '10010', NULL, 'www.aig.com', 2, 18, NULL, 1, 50000000000), (110, 'McKinsey & Company', 'Big 4 consulting', '06-087763', NULL, 'Vendor', '55 E 52nd St.', NULL, 229, 4006, 47561, '10022', NULL, 'www.mckinsey.com', 2, 18, NULL, 1, 10000000000), (111, 'JPMorgan Chase', '4th largest company in the world, Investment and Retail Bank', '06-342323', NULL, 'Organization', '2 Shenkar St.', NULL, 108, 1573, 19469, '62911', NULL, 'www.jpmorgan.com', 51, 198, NULL, 2, 100000000000);
ALTER SEQUENCE organizations_id_seq RESTART WITH 1024;
